title: Shared Board view - date and time not in the respective country setting
excerpt: . I have created a split board view. Unfortunately, the time and day information in the web view is not in German but in English. For example, I need the time to be 17:30 and not 5.30 PM and the days of the week to be Tu…

posts.author: Andreas_Sobing (Andreas Sobing)
posts.cookedHtml:
. I have created a split board view. Unfortunately, the time and day information in the web view is not in German but in English. For example, I need the time to be 17:30 and not 5.30 PM and the days of the week to be Tuesday and not Tuesday.

I have set everything in the settings for the date and our profile to German. There must be a problem with the split board view.

You can also see the text at the top of the website: Get started with your own board Sign up now

I have already an answer from the support:

I would like to inform you that upon checking here, it is expected behavior that the date will be in English even if you set up your profile in German. This is just to set an expectation that the changes of the language and region on the date column apply to the person setting it up and not the whole account, and when shared, it will default to US time.
